description: Research D-ID and fitness-specific AI video capabilities

d-id.fitnessSuitability: Medium - good API, but limited minutes on lower tiers

features: AI adapts workouts based on goals/level/equipment
Publish to apps, web, API, video, social

limitations: Text-to-image tools struggle with consistent trainer appearance across frames
Movement accuracy varies by body type and lighting
Real-time processing ideal but not mandatory
Hybrid approach works better for mid-range smartphones
bestPractices: Focus on movement accuracy over aesthetic complexity

nextStep: Research cost analysis and create comprehensive comparison document
